clean_body: | | Peter, A week ago I wrote to you with sadness about a 5-month-old baby who was fatally shot in the South Shore of Chicago. Tonight, we mourn another gun-related tragedy, the loss of at least 6 lives and over 30 people injured in a violent shooting in Highland Park. My heart goes out to those who lost loved ones – and those who were injured. The shock of these devastating and senseless shootings is overwhelming. I am absolutely determined to fight to reduce gun violence in Chicago and across America. It's outrageous that for more than 3 decades, Republicans have blocked every attempt to reduce the gun violence epidemic in our country. The time for action is NOW. My father was with Martin Luther King the day he was assassinated. The pain of that loss has never left him. And I feel it to this day. Prayers alone are not enough – so I offer you a promise in addition to my prayers tonight. In Congress, I will fight like hell to reduce gun violence here in Chicago and across America. It’s time for action. Jonathan Jonathan is running to create jobs in Illinois, increase workforce skills, and build family economic security, values that Washington could stand to fight for. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4d3f1cdc85e44a24927d82adc708a015&_e=KkhHrzWSLRXWzA4Pe1gYD_3iaBXSc9j5IDhCFHXf_JNHKHpQloVVfEDCGmG5xKEmr8kCgvfUOSJnWLcRjddAKWF4QqiwAkhmtiTaWvtNl84QknTOji0GoJpLurBRDRQdWr-u3A64udwwmgWkJzwAJjlkUXkC70KKeNcp--OUsfqVnZpgt59jhOadjrnt0T3Qu7zxCtsiWvohU4lApFdn5TWDA5T96p6NE9VWXwWWjVqP1ZyzRTPVhGmG_YuMP8JkTg7yiOLWtUgSfCaoDAqa3CAlwXDJcQlFhO_dhrXVR5CXXRkHjPXU25gK8dSUiMH_TgsKL51t-OuGvXZjcc9AzjXp9c8Dpaj5NTmCoVd5hZWu_3v-rI5e_uEmxUsnYHQNocz-RKGPeJv842g3WfU03FqC2KAYR1IiJvwJ2qWqKnDNG4q-FczaaPeW1jwOdgkKms-myOyE69cJr0TbikOfODAbgt4KUjjkJu45sWSBFEeOd4aerLSvUM88WjeB-0jENGYnM0_4VSo9keH7G-Sbx48MhLD7PDsAu963Y2farQJe1d2vSBOyYqGYRNGKkvme)

Peter,

**I love America!**

I love our country so much that I decided to run for the United States Senate. I knew that, with everything happening in America, I couldn't sit on the sidelines anymore.

I'm blessed to be an American. This country has given me so many great opportunities over the course of my life, including representing the United States in the 1992 Winter Olympics.

I know there are things we need to fix about America, but I still love our country deeply. I can't wait to get to Washington so I can get to work in the Senate.

Peter, I'd love to hear from you on this Independence Day. **[Would you please sign our "I Love America" petition?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4d3f1cdc85e44a24927d82adc708a015&_e=KkhHrzWSLRXWzA4Pe1gYD_3iaBXSc9j5IDhCFHXf_JNHKHpQloVVfEDCGmG5xKEmr8kCgvfUOSJnWLcRjddAKWF4QqiwAkhmtiTaWvtNl84QknTOji0GoJpLurBRDRQdWr-u3A64udwwmgWkJzwAJjlkUXkC70KKeNcp--OUsfqVnZpgt59jhOadjrnt0T3Qu7zxCtsiWvohU4lApFdn5TWDA5T96p6NE9VWXwWWjVqP1ZyzRTPVhGmG_YuMP8JkTg7yiOLWtUgSfCaoDAqa3CAlwXDJcQlFhO_dhrXVR5CXXRkHjPXU25gK8dSUiMH_TgsKL51t-OuGvXZjcc9AzjXp9c8Dpaj5NTmCoVd5hZU5Qn9KGkejoxdPg0_M7m4BZLd3QRKH5CsXtBd76RP84-RYlE6MiPRxV5XvvPW01aPDjQxPRjWmY3mXKQdrUZrvY1SPCEju7tV4YwAjduQ3YwjJ-ZbhlaS7229JaBbmlCwWgYCeQngRrrhirp02-Q6YgyMqEqTFkAom4zj4O2dmU9zI235xBwdDWico_MZdQUUufBJD8EEaFDRiR5TheO_O)**

I am running for United States Senate because I love America. I want to bring us together. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=19366d3971c5491cbb37a7a78ac69c0e&_e=Y6t1Q01-H0mvofmkdNrh__AXAul-bK8qHrv6ycoe35b3o3dENflcE_6Oqr88v_ZOOZf-iSyAzMhGqwgbPrPEkdAswtu9vufoQSuiaUlt1kWRDyJN1RYQfI9g57ETzVJa37oGbN4UAj1O7nAvGa7g-rhfVsw0sQsf00XxrGRLk_DmgvFst9RPaDWKC_yfgNjXX4uedsJx70IuDfubYGdIJqsZ3UH_aLfguawvug9I-a7C7Kxl3LR3KCEJqMzLn5NOclaoeAiZUHMGhgu_I-Lk-E1FaLpjMI9lQQH8Jmo9mITI6MQ3mgdlNu2OafJfir6xWmn7USgRn6Cdm0loDxVMYzrzar6Lju24bI7u8O18_FHXiIRtjEud5NVV67seRsjgcz29uS4v-apUp1mK6URVa6ncCNz1P3w1ygWrrjToFMhT3mcms7fUH3ToXh5oE4uoCpfKEcdTocd5W9rkapm5V5rq5blKQaoNqTojKdeelDxm-hLP5yBuY2TbZxdY1E5Hx_wvMBEHVLTaf_W7Zu2eHFrIt9ciT7C_99i1Lumv_nIfFWdKG28J5PdqinHJRWWvI73puhnPdAFob5bl34dIeQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

**I love America!**

I love our country so much that I decided to run for the United States Senate. I knew that, with everything happening in America, I couldn't sit on the sidelines anymore.

I'm blessed to be an American. This country has given me so many great opportunities over the course of my life, including representing the United States in the 1992 Winter Olympics.

I know there are things we need to fix about America, but I still love our country deeply. I can't wait to get to Washington so I can get to work in the Senate.

Peter, I'd love to hear from you on this Independence Day. **[Would you please sign our "I Love America" petition?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=19366d3971c5491cbb37a7a78ac69c0e&_e=Y6t1Q01-H0mvofmkdNrh__AXAul-bK8qHrv6ycoe35b3o3dENflcE_6Oqr88v_ZOOZf-iSyAzMhGqwgbPrPEkdAswtu9vufoQSuiaUlt1kWRDyJN1RYQfI9g57ETzVJa37oGbN4UAj1O7nAvGa7g-rhfVsw0sQsf00XxrGRLk_DmgvFst9RPaDWKC_yfgNjXX4uedsJx70IuDfubYGdIJqsZ3UH_aLfguawvug9I-a7C7Kxl3LR3KCEJqMzLn5NOclaoeAiZUHMGhgu_I-Lk-E1FaLpjMI9lQQH8Jmo9mITI6MQ3mgdlNu2OafJfir6xWmn7USgRn6Cdm0loDxVMYzrzar6Lju24bI7u8O18_FHXiIRtjEud5NVV67seRsjgPytYleLVXbPmSo8I5gpU2udxyUnNJnMtnmmuYoey73epCtIUF5XLuDjAmjJ3GHiGlA5EPvQTh-FDMOTz8m2EU9DEfwGYo6SDCoZFUvnY880jRgRl7iisGUNqh0xyhVTgU3tCE1hteEuoG6oGS1btb7xtyAXaeVWY4axAptsAVSNku5y9m2ntOKi_uD6NfxgGyLUPzn3eiEF1jtfYkbcqYw%3D%3D)**

| | | Friend, ****America is unlike any other nation on Earth. Here, we are fortunate to call ourselves FREE - and that freedom should never be taken for granted, but rather appreciated and cherished each and every day. What better occasion to celebrate that freedom, too, than on the 246th year anniversary of our independence... **From my family to yours, I hope you have a blessed day celebrating the United States of America today - God bless this country, and I hope to get the chance to serve it next year as your Senator from New Hampshire!**___[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTg3MjQ2MjI3NTI3MzEwMjgxJmM9YzB0OSZlPTAmYj05ODk5NTExMjAmZD1wMGE3ZzJo.__B2uHIJJHjVJW0YpH_jsELJQ5SA1oPnUQa9uN2gunQ)_

| | |
We would not be the land of the free and home of the brave without the brave men and women in uniform who sacrificed for us. Let’s also keep that in mind today as we celebrate our independence. Once again, Happy Fourth to you and yours - we should all feel PROUD to call this great nation home! God Bless America, _Chuck Morse_ __
